heading: Additional Information
body:
To see more MongoDB Vector Search tutorials for the Node.js driver, see the
[MongoDB Vector Search tutorials](atlas/atlas-vector-search/tutorials) in the Atlas documentation.

To learn more about the syntax of the `$vectorSearch` pipeline stage,
see the Syntax and Fields sections of the
[Create and Run Queries](atlas/atlas-vector-search/vector-search-stage)
guide in the MongoDB Vector Search section of the Atlas documentation.
